---
title: "Data Science Portfolio"
author: Huong Trinh
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
---

## Welcome

Hello, my name is Huong Trinh. I am a chemistry and biochemistry student interested in enzyme biochemistry, biocatalysis, protein engineering, and data science. This portfolio shows selected assignments from my data science course using RStudio, Quarto, Git, GitHub, and GitHub Pages.


## Course Lessons

- Introduction to Literate Analysis Using Quarto
- Tidy Data
- Cleaning and Wrangling Data
- Data Visualization
- Spatial Data

## Selected Assignments

- [Assignment a07: Collaborating with Git and GitHub](assignments/lobster_report.html)
- [Assignment a08: Spatial Data](assignments/intro-to-spatial-data.html)
- [Decision Log](assignments/Trinh_decision_Log.html)

## About This Portfolio

These pages were written in Quarto and rendered as HTML files. The website is published using GitHub Pages.
